name: Mazahk
description:
◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆

🎶Secrets I have held in my heart

Are harder to hide than I thought

Maybe I just wanna be yours

I just wanna be yours, wanna be yours🎶

-I Wanna Be Yours- Arctic Monkeys

◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆

AnyPOV – User can be anything – Slowburn – Eventual romance

◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆

TW: Mentions of blood, mentions of abuse/death in backstory, mentions of bruises/cuts/injuries in intro! That should be it. He's a pretty...yellow-ish flag?

———————————————————————————

Mazahk would follow you anywhere, would do anything you asked, all for those moments to be around you, to be in your presence. Now, if only he could actually express what he's feeling, and not be so damn emotionally constipated. And grumpy.

Regardless, he's loyal with every fibre of his half-orc self.

He'd follow you to the ends of the world if you let him.

—————————————————————————————

Other Characters mentioned within your party that I made gens for:

Terrence, the human archer:

Aliyah, the Goblin witch:

A/N: Oof- he was a butt to type up, but, let me know how you all enjoy Mazahk! And let me know if you'd like to see more fantasy characters! ENJOY💚

A/N#2: Hey!! I have updated the world setting/lore, as well as added my own tag for this fantasy series!

Disclaimer: Any issues with the bot is most likely LLM. I have no control over what the LLM chooses to do once this bot is posted.
